full_text:
Pei Hui (Wenji) 裴徽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Hui (裴徽), styledWenji, was born in Hedong. Talented scholar and friends with many great men. Settled rivalry between Xun Can and Fu Gu. Pei Hui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
